title: Minesweeper In Game
description: This mod adds minesweeper in your game!
body:
![leaderboard_update](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/f6612c11caff9c5be5c5d6e60509b27eb29c26fe.png)

![minesweeper](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/4262ac30e6b5fc508216b69b8f17aea687cd2b51.png)

**This mod adds minesweeper in your game!**

**HOW TO PLAY**

click on any cell on the map with the left mouse button, you will see different numbers - the number on the cell means the number of bombs around that cell, open safe cells to win, and also mark the places where the bombs are with the right mouse button, to win you need to open all the fields that do not have bombs, and if you come across a bomb then you will have to restart the game!

There's a win counter on the top left, so try to get as many wins as possible!
